word: G3915 - παραχειμασία - paracheimasía - par-akh-i-mas-ee'-ah - Winter in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παραχειμασία

- Transliteration: Paracheimasia

- Phonetic: par-akh-i-mas-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. a passing the winter, wintering

- Origin: from G3914

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G3914; a wintering over: - winter in.
